chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 30 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 618/2025. 2. For hearing of CMA 619/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.04.2026. Mr. Talib Khan Bhatti, Advocate for applicant. = Ali Muhammad-applicant and decree holder in Summary Suit No.13/2023 is aggrieved by the order dated 14.01.2025 passed by the Executing Court granting bail to the respondent-defendant Arbab son of Godar by caste Shaikh subject to deposit of Rs.50,000/- Counsel submits that execution proceedings are still pending before the concerned Court and meanwhile, the respondent-defendant has passed away. He contends that in the circumstances he does not press this revision subject to his right to recover the deposit of Rs.50,000/- and pursue the balance amount from the legal heirs of the judgment debtor as the case may be. The appellant is at liberty to do so subject to all legal consequences. With this observation the revision is disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. JUDGE Tufail
